mnemonics.title: Backprop Steps
mnemonics.content: BACK: 1) Calculate error 2) Apply chain rule 3) Compute gradients 4) Update weights

mnemonics.title: Optimization Methods
mnemonics.content: SGD ADAM: Stochastic, Gradient Descent, Adaptive Moment Estimation

mnemonics.title: Activation Functions
mnemonics.content: ReLU Rules: Rectified Linear Unit prevents vanishing gradients

visualTips.visualization: Imagine rolling a ball down loss landscape hills towards valleys
Visualize as assembly line: raw input → transformed features → final prediction

analogies.analogy: Like step size in mountain hiking - too big overshoots, too small never reaches valley
Like randomly removing players during sports practice to build team resilience
